category_title: First-grade struggling readers who experience cognitive overload and blank out when initiating speech-to-text dictation
minimal_context: David is using the Dragon speech recognition app on an iPad to compose his own version of 'Brown Bear, Brown Bear, What Do You See?'.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Let's write your version of 'Brown Bear, Brown Bear, What Do You See?'. What sentence do you want to write?

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: I see a Transformer driving by me.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Okay, press the dictation button on the Dragon app to record that.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Touches the dictation button and goes blank) ...

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Dragon times out. He repeats the process three times, but Dragon incorrectly transcribes the words. He pushes the iPad away.) I don't want to do this anymore.

dialogue_combined:
TUTOR: Let's write your version of 'Brown Bear, Brown Bear, What Do You See?'. What sentence do you want to write?

STUDENT: I see a Transformer driving by me.

TUTOR: Okay, press the dictation button on the Dragon app to record that.

STUDENT: (Touches the dictation button and goes blank) ...

TUTOR: Keep trying.

STUDENT: (Dragon times out. He repeats the process three times, but Dragon incorrectly transcribes the words. He pushes the iPad away.) I don't want to do this anymore.

task.content: Composing a version of 'Brown Bear, Brown Bear, What Do You See?' using the Dragon SR app. The student intended to write, 'I see a Transformer driving by me.'

context.social_setting: Supervised writing center with teacher present

challenging_behavior_trigger.condition: He touched the dictation button to launch SR
challenging_behavior_trigger.observable_behavior: Went blank. Dragon timed out. Repeated this process three times only to have Dragon incorrectly transcribe. He then lost interest.
challenging_behavior_trigger.internal_state: Struggled to remember what they wanted to dictate to SR
related_quotes: I see a Transformer driving by me

behavior_patterns.observable_behavior: Touched the button to launch SR and then went blank. SR commonly timed out just as they recalled their ideas.
behavior_patterns.internal_state: Cognitive overload from the multitasking requirements of speech recognition
